record.field: Hi {{first_name}}, welcome to Strathmore! We are glad to have you with us. Reply STOP to opt out.
Hello {{first_name}} {{last_name}}, this is a reminder about your upcoming appointment. Please confirm by replying YES. Queries? Email {{email}}.
Dear {{first_name}}, you are invited to our upcoming event. For more details we will reach you on {{phone}}. See you there!
